tagline: Chicagoland's Trusted Pool & Spa Experts Since 1958

hero.headline:
68 Years of Pools Built to
Last a Lifetime
hero.subheadline: From custom in-ground pools to hot tubs, swim spas, and expert service — Arvidson Pools & Spas has been Chicagoland's go-to family for backyard transformations since 1958. Three locations, one promise: quality you can trust.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Pools, Hot Tubs & More —<br class="hidden md:block">All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to years of enjoyment, Arvidson handles every detail. Pools, spas, saunas, water care — one trusted team for your entire backyard.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Emerald Series and Signature Series pools designed and built by a Top 50 Pool Builder. Your dream pool, backed by 68 years of construction expertise.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Caldera Spas, Fantasy Spas, and our exclusive Arvid-Zen line. Year-round relaxation with expert installation and ongoing service support.

cards.title: Swim Spas
cards.description: Hydropool swim spas for exercise, therapy, and family fun. The perfect blend of pool and hot tub in a compact, energy-efficient footprint.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Service
cards.description: Openings, closings, maintenance, repairs, and equipment installation. Our trained technicians keep your investment running flawlessly season after season.

cards.title: Saunas & Wellness
cards.description: FinnLeo traditional and far infrared saunas that bring health and wellness benefits home. Visit our showrooms to experience them firsthand.

cards.title: Water Testing & Products
cards.description: Free in-store water analysis at all three locations. BioGuard-certified water care products to keep your pool and spa crystal clear and balanced.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Visit a Showroom or Call Us
steps.description: Stop by Crystal Lake, Palatine, or St. Charles — or give us a call. We'll discuss your vision, assess your space, and provide a detailed, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced team handles every detail — permits, excavation, plumbing, finishes. You get a dedicated project manager who keeps you informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your new pool, spa, or sauna is ready. And we're here for the long haul with service, water testing, and supplies to keep everything perfect year after year.

about.label: Why Chicagoland Trusts Arvidson
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Excellence — Not a Franchise, a Family
about.description: Since 1958, the Arvidson family has been building pools, selling spas, and earning the trust of homeowners across the greater Chicago area. With three showroom locations, a Gold Standard certification, and Top 50 Pool Builder recognition five years running, we bring a level of expertise and care that no chain can match. Our 95% customer recommendation rate speaks for itself — we treat every project like it's our own backyard.

features.title: Three Convenient Locations
features.description: Crystal Lake, Palatine, and St. Charles showrooms — with hot tubs, pools, and saunas on display so you can see and feel the quality before you buy.

features.title: 68 Years, Same Family Values
features.description: We've earned our reputation one backyard at a time. No subcontractors, no shortcuts — just experienced professionals who take pride in their craft.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: Design, build, maintain, repair. We handle everything so you never have to juggle multiple contractors. One team, one relationship, total peace of mind.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Real Value.
pricing.subtitle: Whether you're building a new pool or need seasonal service, we provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Financing available.

guarantee.headline: Our "Arvidson Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool, spa, or service work doesn't meet your expectations, we'll make it right — period. With 68 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every project, every product, and every service call. That's not a policy. That's who we are.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an in-ground pool?
faqs.answer: Most in-ground pool projects take 8-12 weeks from permit approval to completion, depending on design complexity and weather. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pools and hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to help make your dream backyard affordable. Ask about our current promotions at any of our three locations or during your consultation.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showrooms to see products in person?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Crystal Lake, Palatine, and St. Charles showrooms have hot tubs, swim spas, saunas, and pool displays you can experience firsthand. Our team is on-site to answer every question.

faqs.question: Do you service pools and hot tubs you didn't install?
faqs.answer: Yes, our service department works on all brands and models. Whether we built it or not, our trained technicians can handle openings, closings, repairs, and ongoing maintenance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Chicagoland area including McHenry County, Kane County, Cook County, and Lake County. With three locations in Crystal Lake, Palatine, and St. Charles, we've got the suburbs covered.

testimonials.name: Susan L.
testimonials.text: They built our third pool, and the quality continues to be outstanding. Arvidson is the only team we trust with our backyard — nobody else even comes close.

testimonials.name: Richard D.
testimonials.text: Arvidson was excellent in every way, but most important to us was the management of the project. They kept us informed and delivered exactly what they promised.

testimonials.name: Jennifer B.
testimonials.text: Doug patiently led us through every step of the way with no hidden costs. The entire experience was wonderful, and we couldn't be happier with our new pool.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Visit a showroom, call us, or request a quote online. With 68 years of experience and three locations across Chicagoland, your dream backyard is closer than you think.

footer.description: Family-owned pool & spa experts serving Chicagoland since 1958. Three locations, 68 years of trust.
